name: The Infernal Abyss
short_description: Face the nightmares of the main characters and find a way out of this hell.
detailed_description:
A game in the genre of single-player 2D Horror with adventure elements.

Key Features:

  • Pixel graphics

  • Single player game

  • Creepy atmosphere

This story tells about three friends — Nick, his best friend Steve and his girlfriend Veta, who have always been inseparable. However, everything changed in an instant when one of them broke the bond that united them. Not appreciating what he had, he often cursed his life and thought that death would be less terrible than the moral pain caused by his selfishness. This was his fatal mistake in this story, as well as in his future fate.

The basis of the gameplay is extremely simple: travel through locations, collecting everything you need to advance, and also find cassettes to learn more about our friends! Be careful, because every reaper has its own mechanics!

"Good luck, player, because I will come for each of you"

There are two difficulty levels in the main game.:

 --| CASUAL |--

This game mode is a children's version of the main gameplay.:

-) Lightened enemies

-) Footprints pointing to objects

-) Lightweight bosses

 --| CLASSIC |--

This mode is a classic game mode where:

-) minimum hints

-) aggressive behavior of enemies

It is highly discouraged if you have never played the game!!!

Note: although the game contains small elements of "Backrooms" (for example, moving through levels, or canonical level zero), it has nothing to do with the ent of this universe!!!

supported_languages:
English*, Russian
*languages with full audio support
